verdict.headline: Safe to transact — sanctions screen is clean and the wallet shows a very large, long-standing on-chain balance consistent with a major institutional address.
verdict.reasoning: Sanctions screening returned no matches against the active corpus, removing the hard veto. On-chain history shows an extremely large balance (~656,224 ETH), which is characteristic of a major exchange or institutional wallet (this address is widely known as a Binance cold wallet) and is a strong positive supporting signal. The labels and web_sentiment endpoints returned only API metadata rather than concrete label/sentiment data, so those categories did not contribute usable evidence — this caps confidence at medium. No negative signals were observed across any resolved category.

findings.finding: No matches against active sanctions lists; risk_level reported as low.
Wallet holds ~656,224 ETH, consistent with a large institutional/exchange cold wallet — strong positive evidence of an established, real entity.
Label provider returned only API metadata; no concrete labels (positive or negative) were resolved.
Sentiment provider returned only API metadata; no scam/exploit/hack mentions surfaced.

services.rationale: Zero recent failure rate is the decisive signal; completeness 2/3 and the lowest price ($0.001) beat all other passing candidates, while resource [5] (100% failure) is excluded.
Only candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate, which is the strongest signal, at a low price of $0.005.
Only candidate with both a confirmed 0% failure rate and a higher inputInfoCompleteness (2/3), making it the most reliable choice for wallet balance and transaction history.
Zero recent failure rate is the decisive signal over all untested candidates; resource [1] is excluded at 100% failure rate, making this the only proven performer despite lower input completeness.
